scope: One honest external adapter-first Clawith -> OpenClaw gateway -> Claude/vibecosystem -> Clawith roundtrip.

portable_evidence_bundle.notes: Use these repo-visible paths in tracked packet materials. Raw receipt trees remain local-only and untracked.

maintainer_local_receipt_roots.notes: User-side Clawith session + websocket receipts showing the final assistant reply visible back through the stock chat/session path.
External OpenClaw-gateway worker receipts showing the real inbound message, Claude/vibecosystem execution metadata, and successful report back to Clawith.

assertions_proven: A real Clawith-linked external agent received a pending message through the upstream /api/gateway/* contract.
Claude Code with a vibecosystem-selected executor produced the reply and that reply was reported back through the gateway contract.
The final assistant reply became visible again through the Clawith chat session/websocket path.
non_claims: This does not prove native upstream Clawith model-pool parity.
This does not prove native Role Foundry role/scenario/run APIs already exist upstream in Clawith.
This does not prove sealed, tamper-proof, or independently certified evaluation.
This does not prove broad production hardening for the external executor lane.
review_notes: Tracked packet files should cite the portable bundle under submission/roundtrip-proof/ instead of raw artifacts/... paths.
Maintainer-local receipt roots remain indexed for deep revalidation only; they are not required for basic packet review.
Do not upgrade this proof into native Clawith parity or sealed evaluation claims.
